_meta.description: Preferred professional platforms for each niche/profession. Used to suggest the most relevant social/portfolio links on profile creation and to verify connected platforms.
_meta.primary: Most important platform for recruiters in this niche

Frontend Development.profile_tips: Pin 3-5 live GitHub repos with demos. CodePen for CSS experiments. Personal domain adds credibility.

Backend Engineering.profile_tips: Show system design writeups or architecture diagrams. Open source contributions count heavily.

Mobile Development.profile_tips: Direct links to published apps are the most powerful proof of skill.

DevOps & Cloud.profile_tips: Cloud certifications (AWS, GCP, Azure) are extremely valued. Credly profile for badge display.

Data Science & ML.profile_tips: Kaggle competition rankings and notebook votes are direct signals to recruiters.

UX & Design.profile_tips: Behance case studies with process (research → wireframe → final) outweigh final screenshots alone.

Security.profile_tips: Bug bounty hall-of-fame entries and CVE credits are strong portfolio signals.

Blockchain.profile_tips: Deployed smart contract addresses on mainnet/testnet are verifiable proof of work.

Game Development.profile_tips: Playable demos on itch.io are far more convincing than a portfolio PDF.

Agriculture.profile_tips: Document specific crops, yields, and techniques. Certifications from agricultural extension services help.

Healthcare.profile_tips: Licensure numbers, published research, and verified credentials matter most in this field.

Education.profile_tips: List certifications, teaching licenses, and student outcomes. Video lesson samples add strong proof.

Finance.profile_tips: Certifications (CFA, CPA, ACCA) are highly weighted. Quantify results wherever possible.

Construction.profile_tips: Photo documentation of completed projects is the most compelling portfolio in this field.

Manufacturing.profile_tips: Certifications in Lean, Six Sigma, or ISO standards significantly boost profile credibility.

Retail.profile_tips: Sales metrics and customer satisfaction scores are the strongest signals in retail roles.

Hospitality.profile_tips: Guest review scores, occupancy rates, and revenue metrics are the most valued KPIs to mention.
